zh.Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Rockley於1536年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安時，她的父親Sir John Rockley36歲，母親Lady Isabel Peverell26歲。她於1548年2月10日與Henry Treadway在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利享年24歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Rockley于1536年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安时，她的父亲Sir John Rockley36岁，母亲Lady Isabel Peverell26岁。她于1548年2月10日与Henry Treadway在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾潔利享年24岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾潔利。

nameMeanings.name: Rockley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name chiefly from Rockley in Worsbrough (WR Yorks). There is also evidence for surnames deriving from Rockley (Wilts), Ruckley (Shrops), Rockley in High Bray (Devon), and perhaps Rookley (IoW).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Rockley was born in 1536, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Rockley, was 36 and her mother, Lady Isabel Peverell, was 26. She married Henry Treadway on 10 February 1548, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1560, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 24, and was buried in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckingham: St Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Rockley est née en 1536, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Rockley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Peverell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Treadway le 10 février 1548, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1560, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckingham: St Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Rockley 1536 in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Rockley 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel Peverell 26. Sie hat am 10. Februar 1548 in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Henry Treadway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1560 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Rockley è nata il nel 1536 nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Rockley, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel Peverell, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Henry Treadway il 10 febbraio 1548, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1560, nel Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Rockleyが1536年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで生まれた時，父Sir John Rockleyは36歳，母Lady Isabel Peverellは26歳であった。1548年2月10日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムでHenry Treadwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで24歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckingham: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Rockley(이)가 1536년 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Rockley(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Peverell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1548년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 Henry Treadway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 헤저리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Treadway em 10 de fevereiro de 1548, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Saint Mary's Church, Chesham, Buckingham: ст мэри'с чурч, чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Rockley родилась в 1536 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Rockley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Peverell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Treadway 10 февраля 1548 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1560 г. в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
